_meta.dataset: ТР-4 §2 особые / кратчайшие расстояния — pair overrides and routing-rule overrides
_meta.purpose: Overrides that REPLACE the computed l1+L_K+l3 sum (ТР-4) for specific routes. If a route matches one of these, the computed graph distance is wrong and must be replaced/adjusted per the rule below.
_meta.headline_finding: The «особые/кратчайшие расстояния» regime is RULE-BASED, NOT a flat (a,b,km) pair table. The governing legal acts (Приказ Минтранса РФ от 21.12.2009 №245, superseded 2026-relevant by Приказ Минтранса РФ от 12.09.2024 №313 'Порядок определения кратчайшего расстояния') contain exactly ONE explicit fixed-km override (Moscow ring = 54 км); every other override is a mandated-routing / section-include-exclude rule, not a tabulated distance. There is no published flat 'special distances' km matrix to scrape — Книга 3 itself is already the 'кратчайшее расстояние без обходных и соединительных ветвей' table, and these orders are the named exceptions to it.

authoritative_sources.title: Приказ Минтранса России от 12.09.2024 №313 «Об установлении Порядка определения кратчайшего расстояния, на которое осуществляются перевозки грузов железнодорожным транспортом» (Минюст 17.10.2024)
authoritative_sources.status: CURRENT / in force — this is the active 'особые расстояния' rule set as of 2026; supersedes №245

authoritative_sources.title: Приказ Минтранса России от 21.12.2009 №245 (ред. от 11.10.2019) «Об особенностях определения кратчайших расстояний при перевозке грузов по отдельным участкам российских железных дорог» (Минюст 31.12.2009 №15908)
authoritative_sources.status: PREDECESSOR — superseded by №313, but text is fully readable and the override SUBSTANCE largely carried forward; used here to verify station-level routing and the 54 км value

authoritative_sources.title: ТР-4 Книга 2 Часть 1, Общие положения / Раздел определения тарифных расстояний

_meta.verification: Same 54 км value and the same set of named routing exceptions reproduced across 3 independent mirrors (consultant.ru LAW_96012, consultant.ru LAW_488446, base.garant.ru/197093). In §245 the 54 км is worded as the 'Московский узел' generalized point; in current §313 it is worded as 'Малое кольцо Московской ж.д.' (16 stations) — same physical override, updated wording. NO other fixed-km override exists in either act.
_meta.spb_note: CORRECTION (was reversed): the '+25 км Санкт-Петербургский узел' IS sourced-official — ТР-4 Книга 1 / Указания по определению тарифных расстояний (consultant.ru LAW_63243; Приказ МПС от 15.07.2003 N55, garant.ru 5367457; docs.cntd.ru 901918296). The generalized транзитные пункты «Московский узел» и «Санкт-Петербургский узел» carry FIXED внутриузловые distances of 54 км and 25 км respectively, BOTH with a same-radial-line exclusion (no adder when entry line == exit line; Moscow passenger/baggage variant = 20 км). These are узел ADDERS (applied before the tariff formula), NOT flat (a,b,km) station-pair overrides — they are seeded in hub-distances.json and consumed by computeDistance via the узел path (Gap 6), so the СПб 25 км IS seeded there. The earlier note ('do NOT seed — unsourced') was WRONG and is hereby reversed. The §313/§245 Минтранс orders govern the route-based особые расстояния (routing_rules below); the fixed узел км come from ТР-4 Книга 1 LAW_63243, a separate authoritative source.
_meta.completeness: COMPLETE. The flat (ESR,ESR,km) §2 pair-override matrix does NOT exist as a tabulated free source (Gap 7), so 'overrides' is intentionally EMPTY but now correctly ESR-keyed and reachable by the engine. The узел fixed-km adders (Moscow 54 / SPb 25) are NOT pair overrides — they live in hub-distances.json (see uzel_adders_note). The rule-based portion is captured as precise rules below (not as expanded station pairs, because the acts themselves do not tabulate km for them — they mandate a routing that re-selects which Книга-1/2/3 segments to sum). Expanding every rule into explicit ESR pairs would require per-route км computation against Книга 1/3 and is NOT something the source provides as a table.
_meta.schema: 'overrides' = flat pair-level km overrides, ESR-KEYED ({a,b,km,reason} where a,b are 6-digit station ESR codes matched directly against originEsr/destEsr by computeDistance.ts §2). 'routing_rules' = the rule-based overrides that change WHICH segments get summed (engine applies them as routing constraints, not a km lookup). 'uzel_adders_note' documents the узел fixed-distance adders, which are NOT station-pair overrides and live in hub-distances.json (consumed via the узел path, Gap 6).
_meta.overrides_keying_fix: PREVIOUSLY the single 'overrides' row stored the узел NAME «Московский узел …» in a/b, but computeDistance.ts §2 matches s.a===originEsr (a 6-digit ESR), so the branch was permanently UNREACHABLE (a name never equals an ESR). FIX: 'overrides' is now strictly ESR-keyed and reachable. The Moscow 54 км value was never a station-pair override at all — it is a узел adder (applied before the tariff formula) and belongs in hub-distances.json, not here; it has been moved out of 'overrides' into 'uzel_adders_note'. Per Gap 7 (TARIFF_FILL_PLAN), no flat (ESR,ESR,km) §2 matrix exists in the free sources, so 'overrides' is intentionally empty but now correctly typed/reachable — real ESR pairs can be appended and will be honored immediately.

uzel_adders_note._comment: Узел fixed-distance ADDERS (NOT station-pair overrides). Applied to the tariff distance BEFORE the tariff formula, with a same-radial-line exclusion. Seeded in hub-distances.json and consumed by computeDistance via the узел backbone path (Gap 6). Listed here only for cross-reference; do NOT put these in 'overrides' (they are not (ESR,ESR,km) pairs).
uzel_adders_note.same_radial_line_exclusion: If the wagon enters AND exits the узел on the same radial line, the +54/+25 км is NOT added (Moscow passenger/baggage variant = 20 км). Implemented in computeDistance.ts via hub.lines membership.
uzel_adders_note.legal_ref: ТР-4 Книга 1 / Указания по определению тарифных расстояний — consultant.ru LAW_63243; Приказ МПС от 15.07.2003 N55 (garant.ru 5367457); docs.cntd.ru 901918296
uzel_adders_note.applies_to: cross-radial-line transit aggregated to the «Московский узел» / «Санкт-Петербургский узел» generalized ТП; excluded on same radial line (see routing_rules SAME_RADIAL_LINE)

overrides.note: Красный Сокол → Бологое-Московское. Выверено фактической оплатой оператора (16 ваг ПВ кл1 групповая = 34906 ₽/ваг × 16 × 1.22 НДС = 681365.12). Движок без правила скоростных линий даёт 539 (срезка через Сапсан-ход Москва–СПб); правило §2 ТР-4 исключает скоростные линии → легальный объезд 801. Якорь до внедрения общего правила скоростных линий.

routing_rules.rule: Between stations aggregated under the generalized «Московский узел» point, take FIXED 54 км. This is the 'overrides' row above; listed here too because it is conditional on the cross-radial-line case.
routing_rules.condition: applies to cross-line transit through the Moscow node; excluded when same-radial-line (see SAME_RADIAL_LINE)

routing_rules.rule: For freight TO/FROM stations located ON the Большое Московское кольцо, the shortest distance INCLUDES the actual distance of travel along the ring (фактическое расстояние следования по кольцу). БМК stations include: Воскресенск, Непецино, Михнево, Детково, Жилёво, Столбовая, Кресты, Бекасово-Сорт., Бекасово I, Акулово, Кубинка I/II, Манихино II, Лукино, Поварово II, Белый Раст, Икша, Яхрома, Дмитров, Костино, Желтиково, Наугольный, Бужаниново, Арсаки, Александров, Бельково, Киржач, Поточино, Орехово-Зуево, Дулёво, Давыдово, Куровская, Егорьевск I.
routing_rules.condition: destination or origin is a БМК station; distance = leg + actual-ring-segment + leg (no flat override, recompute via ring)

routing_rules.scope: Большое Московское кольцо — transit between stations on DIFFERENT radial lines inside the ring
routing_rules.rule: For stations inside the ring on different radial lines, distance = origin → ring entry station → ring distance → ring exit station → destination, routed through the specific entry/exit junctions enumerated in the order's subsections (per-radial-line mapping). Re-selects segments; not a flat km.
routing_rules.condition: origin and destination on different radial lines within БМК

routing_rules.scope: Москва — same radial line within БМК
routing_rules.rule: If origin and destination lie on ONE radial line, the direct shortest distance between them is taken WITHOUT attaching to БМК входные/выходные stations and WITHOUT the 54 км node override (без учёта привязки к входным (выходным) станциям). This is the same-line exclusion noted in TARIFF_CALCULATOR.md §3.1.
routing_rules.condition: exclusion of the 54 км / ring detour when same radial line

routing_rules.rule: Shipments to Far Eastern stations are routed (and distance summed) via the direction through Тайшет — Иркутск — Чита I — Бамовская — Волочаевка I (and Лена — Хани — Ургал I for the BAM corridor). The computed distance must follow this mandated direction, not a shorter graph path.
Section Кривенковская — Энем I is INCLUDED in the distance when BOTH origin and destination are within the North Caucasus railway; EXCLUDED when either terminal is outside it.
routing_rules.condition: both endpoints on СКЖД → include section; else exclude

routing_rules.rule: For the участок Журавка (ЮВЖД) — Миллерово (СКЖД), the shortest distance is determined WITH the distance of the route Журавка — Зайцевка (ЮВЖД) — Кутейниково (СКЖД) — Миллерово (с учётом расстояния участка). Mandated routing replaces the otherwise-shorter (cross-border) graph path.

For участки Лихая (СКЖД) — Обливская (ПривЖД) and Морозовская — Цимлянская (СКЖД), distance via Морозовская — Цимлянская — Куберле is counted ONLY IF the resulting transit distance does not exceed the кратчайшее расстояние per ТР-4. Conditional inclusion based on whether the routed distance is ≤ tariff maximum.
routing_rules.condition: include the section only if routed distance ≤ ТР-4 shortest

routing_rules.rule: Section Лосево I — Каменногорск is INCLUDED in the distance for destinations Каменногорск / Выборг / Пихтовая / Высоцк / Светогорск / Бусловская; EXCLUDED (bypass routing) otherwise.
routing_rules.condition: include for the named Vyborg-area destinations; else exclude

routing_rules.rule: Section Ледмозеро II — Кочкома is INCLUDED for Костомукша and Finnish-railway destinations; EXCLUDED for bypass routes.

A large family of per-origin-region mandated routings around the СПб/Тверь/Бологое node: sections Ховрино–Бологое, Бологое–Чудово, Овинище I–Кабожа–Неболчи, Новосокольники–Дно, Дно–Батецкая, Тверь–Осеченка, Лихославль–Торжок–Селижарово, Дорошиха–Васильевский Мох, Редкино–Завидово, etc. are INCLUDED/EXCLUDED and routed via specific directions (e.g. Мурманск/Петрозаводск via Маленьга–Сонково; СПб via Дно–Бологое) depending on origin region and destination. No flat km — they re-select which Книга-1 segments sum. СПб узел has NO fixed-km override (contrary to the '+25 км' note in the design doc).
routing_rules.condition: origin-region- and destination-dependent routing; engine must follow mandated direction

routing_rules.rule: Distance = actual routing within Kaliningrad railway + shortest path beyond its boundary to the foreign-railway handover point (segmented at boundary).
Distance computed SEPARATELY for the island segment and the mainland segment (no through-summation across the strait as a single graph edge).
Crimean bridge route via Вышестеблиевская → Багерово; ferry route via Кавказ and Керчь/Симферополь ports. Mandated routing for the Crimea crossing.
Complex routing via Успенская / Гуково / Выстрел through multiple operators (Донецкая, Луганская, Херсонская branches); distance based on фактическое расстояние перевозки (actual travelled distance).

For shipments via alternative routes whose distance does NOT exceed the established shortest distance, the ACTUAL travelled distance is taken as the shortest. (General catch-all: a real shorter actual route wins over the tabulated one.)
routing_rules.condition: actual route ≤ tabulated shortest → use actual

routing_rules.rule: During planned repair/reconstruction of infrastructure, shortest distances follow the routes announced by the infrastructure owner (по объявляемым владельцем инфраструктуры маршрутам), if agreed with the shipper. Temporary, not a permanent override; do NOT seed as a permanent edge.
routing_rules.condition: temporary, owner-announced; out of scope for static seed
